docs.title: numbapy
docs.text: numbapy is a minimal example package showing how to use Numba to JIT-compile a simple function.

docs.title: Quickstart
docs.text:
import numpy as np
from numbapy import sum_of_squares

x = np.arange(100_000, dtype=np.float64)
print(sum_of_squares(x))

docs.title: sum_of_squares
docs.text:
from numbapy import sum_of_squares

Computes $\sum_i x_i^2$ for a 1D array, using a Numba-compiled inner loop.
